title: carlina gummifera
intro: Carlina gummifera, also known as carline thistle, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Carlina gummifera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
